signals.headline: ETH ETF Weekly Inflows Hit $275M, Strongest Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Weekly Inflows Hit $275M, Strongest Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows, the highest since January 2026, led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to near $2,400 before settling around $2,288.[1]  
This institutional demand surge, amid a broader crypto market cap rise to $2.6 trillion
